title: Kodama Tales Licenses New Grappler Baki Manga
content: Kyodo Printing Co., Ltd. 's Kodama Tales subsidiary announced on Wednesday that it has licensed Keisuke Itagaki 's New Grappler Baki manga , the first sequel to the original 1991 series. The first two volumes will ship in November.
author: ANN

title: Red River Anime Announces 5 Cast Members
content: The official website for the television anime of Chie Shinohara 's Red River ( Sora wa Akai Kawa no Hotori ) shōjo manga announced five more cast members for the anime on Thursday.
author: ANN

title: Glasses With a Chance of Delinquent Romance Manga Gets Anime
content: Kodansha announced on Thursday that Naruki 's Glasses With a Chance of Delinquent ( Megane, Tokidoki, Yankee-kun ) manga is inspiring a television anime. Kodansha did not reveal any further details about the anime adaptation, but Naruki drew the below illustration to celebrate the anime's announcement.
author: ANN

title: Manga 'Megane, Tokidoki, Yankee-kun' Gets TV Anime
content: An official website opened for a television anime adaptation of Naruki 's Megane, Tokidoki, Yankee-kun ( Glasses with a Chance of Delinquent ) manga on Thursday. The website revealed a celebratory illustration (pictured above) drawn by Naruki.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Sora wa Akai Kawa no Hotori' Announces More Cast
content: The official website of the Sora wa Akai Kawa no Hotori ( Red River ) television anime revealed more cast on Thursday. The anime series adapting Chie Shinohara 's adventure fantasy manga will air on NTV and BS NTV beginning in July 2026.
author: MyAnimeList

title: One Piece Fans Are Ignoring The Biggest Theme of The Story
content: The One Piece manga entered its Final Saga in 2022 and is still nowhere near its finale. The story is famously long, which is one of its best qualities. The Eiichiro Oda’s beloved Weekly Shonen Jump manga One Piece began serializing in the Weekly Shonen Jump magazine in 1997 and has taken the crew to several islands…
author: ComicBook

title: Dragon Ball Super’s New Remake Is a Great Idea, Here’s Why
content: Dragon Ball kicked off the year with several exciting announcements during the Genki Dama Matsuri, an event held to commemorate the manga’s 40th anniversary. The franchise is planning a huge return this year with a remake film as part of the Fall 2026 season lineup and will retell the story of Dragon Ball Z: Battle of…

title: 11 Years Later, Acclaimed Shonen Jump Anime Is Finally Coming to Netflix
content: The first month of the Spring 2026 anime season is almost over, and it has brought several surprises in the anime world. Netflix , a major streaming giant, continues to venture into the anime industry with new additions and projects that always pique the interest of anime enthusiasts.
author: ComicBook
